SHORT NAME: — 
LONG NAME: OIP_PRMRY_PMT 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
12 
SOURCE:

VALUES: 
— 
COMMENT: 
This variable was new in 2010; it will always be null/missing in earlier files. 
There are two cost/use categories from the IP data files: Acute and the OIP. 
Medicare payments are described in detail in a series of Medicare Payment Advisory Commission 
(MedPAC)
